curatorNote:
Hobbs' 1/1 contract features four works (Return Zero, Elektroanima, One One Overflow and Days Fade) that exemplify his exploration of merging manual and computational processes, whether through hand-drawn curves or algorithmic dot placement.

Hivemind holds three 1/1s from the Tyler Hobbs contract, each refining a different dimension of his algorithmic vocabulary. One One Overflow highlights the beauty of algorithmic unpredictability and imperfection; Elektroanima is an exploration of the interplay between hand-drawn art and algorithmic precision; and Return Zero [Blue] defines the flowing curves and geometric shapes that would later evolve into Fidenza.
